tasks.title: Promoter admin decision actor-context guardrails
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: harden registrar admin decision internals with explicit actor-context guardrails (system-only authority path, deterministic forbidden handling) and targeted service tests. No route/schema/UI additions.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api test -- registrar.service.test.ts registrar.controller.test.ts && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
